default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO, and website updates.](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Approval sought for publishing "What to Pack" articles to capitalize on current traffic (100 monthly clicks/week)](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Need to prioritize keywords where Adventures Group isn't well-positioned for future content](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Planning content refreshes for seasonal articles (e.g., New Year's, Christmas) 5-6 months in advance](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [New attractions at Caletas to be added to tour pages and potentially leveraged for keywords](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

## Topics

### "What to Pack" Content Strategy

  - [Seeking approval to publish "What to Pack" articles until April](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Workflow replicates and adjusts recommendations for specific items](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Summer season packing tips for Vallarta (mid-June to mid-November): bug spray, sunscreen, small umbrella](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Winter packing tips: sweater, long pants for chilly mornings/nights](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

### Keyword Strategy and Content Prioritization

  - Marietas page: Already ranking \#3 for "Marieta" keyword
  - [Yalapa page: Currently in 5th position](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Next steps: Adventures Group to provide list of next 2 destinations for Cancun, Cabo, and Vallarta](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [Cancun: Isla Mujeres](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [Cabo: Arch of Cabo](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [GrowthX to research keywords and prioritize content creation](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

### Content Refreshes

  - [Recent refreshes: Sunset in Cabo, 4th of July](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Planning refreshes for New Year's and Christmas articles](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Events articles perform well across destinations](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Refresh strategy: Add new headings, update published date, 5-6 months prior to event](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)

### Website Updates and SEO

  - [New features for Caletas, especially Kids Adventure section](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Potential keywords to explore: parasailing, hydrophone (whale sounds)](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - ["Sightseeing" keyword opportunity for Vallarta (Los Arcos, malecón)](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Redirects needed for duplicated content (e.g., "what to do in Cancun" vs "what to do Cancun")](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Bullet point issue has been fixed](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

### Content Display and SEO Focus

  - [Discussion on hiding certain articles from blog homepage while maintaining SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [For "What to Pack" series: Use one main image, add destination-related image in content](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Possibility of creating a landing page grouping similar content (e.g., packing lists for different months)](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adventures Group to approve "What to Pack" articles for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Provide list of next 2 destinations for Cancun, Cabo, and Vallarta to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [GrowthX to research keywords for new destination pages](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Plan content refreshes for seasonal articles (New Year's, Christmas)](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Update Caletas tour pages with new attractions (in 1-1.5 months)](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Explore "sightseeing" keyword opportunities for Vallarta](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [GrowthX to send list of URLs for redirects to Oscar for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Lucero and Angie to review and approve pending articles for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/T_LWyV-NUf5BSnk3EwXFGfBLWXnTNxdy?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)

action_items.description: Ask marketing managers for Vallarta packing recommendations by season; share on Slack
Compile list of next 2 destinations for Cancun, Cabo, Vallarta for keyword research; send to Mariana
Conduct keyword research for Isla Mujeres (Cancun) and Arch of Cabo (Cabo)
Create list of URL redirects; send to Isabel for Oscar to implement
Review pending articles for publication today or tomorrow
